mission.title: bank-vaults: Read entrypoint and cmd from image configuration
mission.description:
In a case when we wanna use entrypoint and cmd of an image we can download that information from registry via API and use it as args for vault-env.

If arguments won't be given for vault-env, the vault-env will try to get entrypoint and cmd from image configuration via registry API. In case when arguments are declared, the vault-env acts as usual.

For docker hub we have to declare only `CONTAINER_IMAGE` environment variable, e.g `CONTAINER_IMAGE=tczekajlo/demo:latest`.

For private registry, we have to declare additional env variables.
`REGISTRY_ADDRESS="https://my.registry"`
`REGISTRY_SECRET_PATH="secret/data/registry"` - vault-env will be looking for credentials to the registry in the given path. The path should contain `USERNAME` and `PASSWORD` keys.
`CONTAINER_IMAGE_TRIM="my.registry/"` - trim registry address from image name. 
`REGISTRY_SKIP_VERIFY="true"` - skip SSL verification. 

Fixes: #475

resolution.summary:
…o pull if specified.

This PR can be marked as WIP, it works for the specific implementation that we need, but mostly want to get input from maintainers if they think this is a good route.

I can rework this a bit to be more generic in terms of accepting authentication and clean up the code, write some tests possibly.

Partly addresses https://github.com/banzaicloud/bank-vaults/issues/355, https://github.com/banzaicloud/bank-vaults/issues/227
